description_long: This is a compact, single-story bar with a flat roof, featuring a prominent rooftop sign displaying two large beer mugs and the word 'BEER' in bold, illuminated letters. The front facade is adorned with a green-and-white striped awning above a row of outdoor bar stools and a service counter, suggesting a casual, approachable atmosphere. The building is constructed with reddish-brown walls, large rectangular windows on the side, and a small potted plant adding a touch of greenery. Trash bins are placed at the front and side, indicating attention to cleanliness and urban integration. The main entrance is shaded by a polygonal brown canopy, and the overall design is simple yet inviting, with clear cues for social gathering. The architectural style leans toward modern utilitarian with playful signage and outdoor seating.
description: A small, modern bar with a flat roof, bold rooftop beer signage, striped awning, outdoor stools, and large windows, designed for casual urban socializing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped awning, outdoor bar stools, service counter, and trash bin, emphasizing the main entrance and social area.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the large 'BEER' sign with beer mugs, polygonal canopy over the entrance, two large windows, and a potted plant.
description_view_2: Rear side view reveals a plain wall with minimal features, only the edge of the rooftop sign and a potted plant visible.
description_view_3: Back view displays a featureless wall and the rear of the rooftop sign, with the awning and outdoor seating barely visible on the side.
attribute_signage: Large rooftop sign with the word 'BEER' in illuminated block letters, flanked by two oversized beer mug sculptures; sign is mounted on a raised platform and is highly prominent.
attribute_entrance_type: Single door entrance beneath a polygonal brown canopy, with a green-and-white striped awning above the outdoor counter and stools.
attribute_window_arrangement: Two large rectangular windows on the side facade, symmetrically placed next to the entrance, with simple framing.
attribute_outdoor_seating: Yes, five bar stools arranged in a row at the front counter beneath the awning.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern utilitarian with playful commercial signage and minimal decorative elements.
